name: nuclei
title: nuclei
summary: Fast and customizable vulnerability scanner based on simple YAML based DSL
description:
Fast and customizable vulnerability scanner based on simple YAML based DSL
This package contains  a fast tool for configurable targeted scanning based on
templates offering massive extensibility and ease of use.
.
Nuclei is used to send requests across targets based on a template
leading to zero false positives and providing fast scanning on large
number of hosts. Nuclei offers scanning for a variety of protocols
including TCP, DNS, HTTP, File, etc. With powerful and flexible
templating, all kinds of security checks can be modelled with Nuclei.

commands.name: nuclei
commands.description: Nuclei is a fast, template based vulnerability scanner focusing

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use nuclei because Fast and customizable vulnerability scanner based on simple YAML based DSL.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use nuclei as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nuclei [options] [args]` as documented upstream for nuclei.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair nuclei with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `nuclei --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
